## 🔒 Security Vulnerability Report

**⚠️ IMPORTANT: This is a security report. Please do not post this publicly or in public repositories.**

### Vulnerability Type

**Category:**
- [ ] Authentication bypass
- [ ] Authorization bypass
- [ ] Information disclosure
- [ ] Cross-site scripting (XSS)
- [ ] Cross-site request forgery (CSRF)
- [ ] SQL injection
- [ ] Remote code execution
- [ ] Denial of service
- [ ] Other (describe)

**Severity:**
- [ ] Critical (immediate action required)
- [ ] High (action required within 24 hours)
- [ ] Medium (action required within 1 week)
- [ ] Low (action required within 1 month)

### Vulnerability Description

**What is the vulnerability?**
<!-- Provide a clear description of the security issue -->

**Where is it located?**
<!-- Specify the file, function, or component affected -->

**How can it be exploited?**
<!-- Describe the attack vector and exploitation method -->

### Impact Assessment

**What can an attacker do?**
- [ ] Access unauthorized data
- [ ] Modify data
- [ ] Execute code
- [ ] Deny service
- [ ] Escalate privileges
- [ ] Other (describe)

**Who is affected?**
- [ ] All users
- [ ] Authenticated users only
- [ ] Administrators only
- [ ] Specific user groups
- [ ] Other (describe)

**Data at risk:**
- [ ] User credentials
- [ ] Personal information
- [ ] System configuration
- [ ] OBS Studio access
- [ ] Other (describe)

## 📋 Checklist

Before submitting, please ensure you have:

- [ ] Described the vulnerability clearly
- [ ] Provided steps to reproduce
- [ ] Assessed the impact and severity
- [ ] Included environment details
- [ ] Specified disclosure preferences
- [ ] Suggested potential fixes

## 🔒 Security Response Process

**What happens next:**

1. **Acknowledgment**: You'll receive an acknowledgment within 24 hours
2. **Investigation**: Our security team will investigate the report
3. **Fix Development**: We'll develop and test a fix
4. **Release**: A security update will be released
5. **Credit**: You'll be credited in the security advisory (unless you prefer to remain anonymous)

**Contact Information:**

- **Security Email**: [security@dxpr.com](mailto:security@dxpr.com)
- **PGP Key**: [Download our PGP key](https://dxpr.com/security/pgp-key.asc)
- **Security Policy**: [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md)

## 🙏 Thank You

Thank you for responsibly reporting this security issue. Your contribution helps keep DXPR and its users safe! 🔒

---

**Remember: Keep this report confidential and do not post it publicly.**
